title: Infisical | The modern security platform for developers and agents
rawContent: Infisical | The modern security platform for developers and agents Meet Agent Vault — Give AI agents API access without exposing your secrets. Open source, now on GitHub Infisical Stars Docs Careers Blog Pricing Sign Up Get a Demo Secure Secrets, Certificates, and AI Agents All-in-one platform to securely manage application secrets, certificates, SSH keys, and privileged access across classic and AI infrastructure. Get a Demo Get Started Secrets Management Centralize application secrets across environments and workloads. Enforce identity-based access, auditing, and secure delivery at runtime. Learn more Try it now Certificate Management Centralize certificate lifecycle management across your infrastructure. Automate issuance and renewal operations to eliminate expiration risk across internal and external PKI. Learn more Try it now Privileged Access Management Grant privileged access to infrastructure and sensitive systems only when needed. Enforce just-in-time access with identity-based policies and full auditability. Learn more Try it out Everyone has secrets. We secure over 500 million every day. Explore product features Secrets Management across Infrastructure Manage secrets across all of your infrastructure – from Kubernetes and Terraform to CI/CD pipelines and local development -- both on-prem and in the cloud. Learn more Dynamic Secrets & Secret Rotation Eliminate long-lasting credentials to reduce risk of breach and credential leaks. Generate secrets dynamically on-demand in a way that is unique to every client. Learn more Agent Sentinel Govern how AI agents access tools and external systems. Centralize authentication, policy enforcement, and visibility across MCP endpoints. Learn more Securing the future of AI with Infisical "Infisical provided all the functionality and security settings we needed to boost our security posture and save engineering time. Whether you're working locally, running kubernetes clusters in production, or operating secrets within CI/CD pipelines, Infisical has a seamless prebuilt workflow." Adrien Carreira, Head of Infrastructure, Hugging Face Read Customer Story Read Customer Story We've got your back, no matter your stack. Use Infisical to manage secrets in your favorite cloud providers, Infrastructure tools, frameworks, and more. Explore all integrations GitHub Secrets Manager Kubernetes Docker Azure Key Vault Terraform GitLab Ansible GCP Secret Manager Vercel Heroku Cloudflare Jenkins Bitbucket Render Enterprise-level governance. Infisical lets you set up tight authorization policies, and provides access control tools to embrace "security shift left". Audit Logs Track everything. Be aware of every action that is happening to your secrets and other sensitive data. Learn more Access Controls Stay in control. Set up tight granular permissions for human and machine identities. Learn more Approval Workflows Review sensitive changes. Just like in git, assign reviewers to approve secret changes before propagating to apps. Learn more Temporary Access Trust minimally. Give access to sensitive resources only temporarily. Revoke automatically upon expiration. Learn more Reliability you can count on. Infisical leads the industry with its reliability and security initiatives. Compliant Infisical is SOC 2, HIPAA, and FIPS 140-3 compliant and is constantly undergoing continuous penetration testing. Learn more Reliable Powering mission-critical infrastructures of all sizes, with support SLAs and observability. Learn more Secure Infisical encrypts secrets with AES-GCM-256, enforces tight authentication policies, and more. Learn more Self-hostable Deploy Infisical on your own infrastructure or use Infisical Cloud with no maintenance overhead. Learn more 3,000+ Community Members Join Slack 12,000+ Organizations on Infisical Get Started 99.99% Uptime Guarantee Learn more Starting with Infisical is simple, fast, and free.
